Class CookingSkill

java.lang.Object
net.sylphian.minecraft.skills.skill.AbstractSkill
net.sylphian.minecraft.cooking.skill.CookingSkill
All Implemented Interfaces:
Skill, Watchable, org.bukkit.event.Listener
public final class CookingSkill extends AbstractSkill
The Cooking skill. Handles CookingStartEvent and CookingCompleteEvent to fire passives, and CookingXpEvent to award XP. All event handlers run on the main thread.

  • Field Summary

    Fields inherited from class AbstractSkill

    skillsApi

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Set<org.bukkit.Material>
    activationBlocks()
    Sneak-right-clicking any cooking station block opens the active-ability menu.
    void
    onCookingComplete(CookingCompleteEvent event)
    Fires passive complete triggers and writes quality shifts, XP multiplier, and any bonus output back to the event.
    void
    onCookingDiscovery(CookingDiscoveryEvent event)
    Awards the one-time discovery bonus the first time a player cooks a recipe.
    void
    onCookingMilestone(CookingMasteryMilestoneEvent event)
    Awards the milestone bonus when a player reaches a configured mastery milestone.
    void
    onCookingStart(CookingStartEvent event)
    Fires passive start triggers and applies any accumulated cook-time reduction to the event.
    void
    onCookingXp(CookingXpEvent event)
    Awards XP once the service has rolled quality and fired CookingXpEvent.
    void
    onQuit(org.bukkit.event.player.PlayerQuitEvent event)
    Clears the player's streak state and any debug watch session where they are the subject.
    void
    registerListeners(org.bukkit.plugin.Plugin owningPlugin, SkillsAPI api)
    Stores the skills API reference and registers this as a Bukkit listener under owningPlugin.
    void
    reload()
    Called when the owning plugin reloads its config.

  • Method Details

    • registerListeners

      public void registerListeners(org.bukkit.plugin.Plugin owningPlugin, SkillsAPI api)
      Description copied from class: AbstractSkill
      Stores the skills API reference and registers this as a Bukkit listener under owningPlugin.
      Specified by:
      registerListeners in interface Skill
      Overrides:
      registerListeners in class AbstractSkill
      Parameters:
      owningPlugin - the plugin that owns this skill's listeners
      api - the skills API for XP, cooldowns, and buff tracking

    • activationBlocks

      public Set<org.bukkit.Material> activationBlocks()
      Sneak-right-clicking any cooking station block opens the active-ability menu.
      Returns:
      the trigger block types, or an empty set if not applicable

    • reload

      public void reload()
      Description copied from interface: Skill
      Called when the owning plugin reloads its config. No-op by default.

    • onCookingStart

      public void onCookingStart(CookingStartEvent event)
      Fires passive start triggers and applies any accumulated cook-time reduction to the event.

    • onCookingComplete

      public void onCookingComplete(CookingCompleteEvent event)
      Fires passive complete triggers and writes quality shifts, XP multiplier, and any bonus output back to the event. Quality rolling happens in the service after this handler returns.

    • onCookingXp

      public void onCookingXp(CookingXpEvent event)
      Awards XP once the service has rolled quality and fired CookingXpEvent.

    • onCookingDiscovery

      public void onCookingDiscovery(CookingDiscoveryEvent event)
      Awards the one-time discovery bonus the first time a player cooks a recipe.

    • onCookingMilestone

      public void onCookingMilestone(CookingMasteryMilestoneEvent event)
      Awards the milestone bonus when a player reaches a configured mastery milestone.

    • onQuit

      public void onQuit(org.bukkit.event.player.PlayerQuitEvent event)
      Clears the player's streak state and any debug watch session where they are the subject.
